title: HorizonIris Impact Graph — RALIA configuration
summary: The regulatory-impact propagation graph as configured in RALIA's HorizonIris surface: the ImpactGraph primitive bound to RALIA's regulation→practice-area→client data shape, with RALIA-specific category weighting and Iris-narrated annotations.
buildInstead: Use the data-viz ImpactGraph primitive with your own data shape; the HorizonIris weighting model and narration are RALIA-private.
